channel.title: Remio Host for Linux
channel.description: Most recent updates for Remio Host on Linux

item.title: Version 1.0.1
item.description:
Remio Host for Linux 1.0.1

Clear guidance when running in a Wayland session: Remio Host now detects it at startup and shows exactly how to switch to an Xorg session, instead of streaming a silent black screen

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
Remio Host for Linux 1.0.0

First production release of Remio Host for Linux — stream your Linux desktop to iPhone, iPad, Android, Mac, or Windows at up to 4K 60 fps with instant QR pairing, full mouse, keyboard and gamepad control, clipboard sync, file transfer, and dynamic resolution that follows your device's screen. Ships as a portable AppImage for virtually any modern distro, plus a .deb for Ubuntu 24.04 and newer.
